title: BEM-597 force curator route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
curator_inbox=Path('governance/curator/inbox'); curator_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
role_inbox=Path('governance/role_orchestrator/inbox'); role_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending'); pending.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
router_state=Path('governance/state/curator_inbox_router_state.json'); router_state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

decision_id='bem584_decision_format_live_test'
intake_path=curator_inbox/('operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.json')
if intake_path.exists():
    try: intake=json.loads(intake_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: intake={}
else:
    intake={'schema_version':'curator_intake.operator_decision.v1','record_type':'operator_decision_curator_intake','decision_id':decision_id,'operator_choice':'1','selected_option':'Короткая таблица','question':'Какой формат Telegram-сообщения использовать для решений оператора?','handoff_to':'curator','next_route':'internal_contour','status':'ready_for_curator','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:55 (UTC+3)'}
    intake_path.write_text(json.dumps(intake,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

route={
  'schema_version':'role_orchestrator_intake.v1',
  'record_type':'curator_operator_decision_route',
  'decision_id':decision_id,
  'source_file':str(intake_path),
  'from_role':'curator',
  'to_role':'role_orchestrator',
  'next_route':'internal_contour',
  'operator_choice':intake.get('operator_choice'),
  'selected_option':intake.get('selected_option'),
  'question':intake.get('question'),
  'status':'ready_for_role_orchestrator',
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:55 (UTC+3)',
  'payload':intake
}
route_path=role_inbox/('curator_operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.json')
route_path.write_text(json.dumps(route,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

task=pending/('role_orchestrator_operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.md')
task.write_text('# Role Orchestrator Intake | Operator Decision'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision_id+sep+'Choice: '+str(route.get('operator_choice'))+sep+'Selected option: '+str(route.get('selected_option'))+sep+sep+'Next: route to internal contour according to curator package.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
router_state.write_text(json.dumps({'processed_intakes':[str(intake_path)],'last_run':{'created':[str(route_path)],'count':1,'status':'completed','blocker':None},'updated_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:55 (UTC+3)'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

report=reports/'bem597_force_curator_to_role_inbox.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-597 | Force Curator To Role Inbox | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:55 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Existing curator intake was forced into role_orchestrator inbox and pending task was created.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(route_path)+sep+'- '+str(task)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem597_force_curator_to_role_inbox','cycle_id':'bem597-force-curator-to-role-inbox','source':'gpt','status':'completed','route_file':str(route_path),'pending_task':str(task),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:55 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem597_force_curator_to_role_inbox']={'status':'completed','route_file':str(route_path),'pending_task':str(task),'blocker':None}
state['operator_decision_role_orchestrator_handoff']='completed'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:55 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem597_force_curator_to_role_inbox.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-597 PASS: curator intake forced to role_orchestrator inbox.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(intake_path),str(route_path),str(task),str(router_state),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Forced existing curator intake into role_orchestrator inbox and created pending route task')
"""
No issue comments.
